While sometimes called a pilgrimage, the 2022 pilgrimage was more of a business trip/social trip with only a few religious observances

During this pilgrimage [[Immanuelle]] launched [[Evolution.faith]] and paved the ground for the YouTube channel

[[Category:2022]]
[[Category:History]]
[[sn:2022 pilgrimage]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
